prompt: A dreamy, cinematic fantasy illustration in vertical poster format, showing Liu Yifei in side profile walking barefoot across a perfectly still midnight-blue lake under a luminous full moon and a richly detailed star-filled sky with the Milky Way stretching diagonally behind her. She is a graceful East Asian woman with shoulder-length dark hair, wearing a shimmering silver sleeveless evening gown with a flowing skirt and a thigh slit, the fabric sparkling like stardust. Her expression is calm and introspective, and she faces to the right as one foot touches the water, creating delicate glowing ripples. Two small dark islands sit low on the horizon, one on each side, emphasizing the vast open water and sky. A glowing vine of soft white roses and petals wraps around her body in an elegant S-curve, beginning behind her upper back, spiraling around her waist and legs, and continuing downward into the reflection. Beneath the water, instead of a normal reflection, create a large luminous line-art tiger formed from fine white neon-like contours, upside down relative to the woman above, with its body curled dynamically and its head near a large glowing white rose at the lower right; the tiger should feel majestic, lean, and ethereal rather than aggressive. The overall palette is cool blue, silver, and white, with gentle moonlight, soft bloom, mirror-like reflections, magical realism, ultra-clean composition, high detail, romantic fantasy mood. Add elegant cursive text centered near the bottom that reads In me the tiger sniffs the rose., plus one small four-point star icon near the lower right corner. Make it refined, poetic, and visually symbolic of inner strength and tenderness.
